steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that specifies when Ur formed. This requires precise timing information — a numeric age or date — not a general description of what Ur is or what happened to it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Ur was a supercontinent, a single landmass made up of most or all of Earth’s continents.: Defines the supercontinent but gives no timing. ✗
  • Choice B — The supercontinent Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago.: Directly states when Ur formed with a precise figure. ✓
  • Choice C — Long ago, the Earth was home to supercontinents like Ur and Columbia.: Lacks a specific timeframe; "ancient" or similar phrasing doesn't satisfy "specify when." ✗
  • Choice D — Over hundreds of millions of years, the supercontinent cycle results in supercontinents forming and breaking apart.: Focuses on subsequent events, not on when formation occurred. ✗
B is correct.
